captions.01.jpeg: At this Balcones Neighborhood home I replaced the rotted Ipe wood on this gate and finished it with Penofin Penetrating Oil Finish.
captions.02.jpeg: Ipe can be difficult to work with and requires predrilling and special screws but it is extremely durable and looks amazing when finished.
captions.03.jpeg: This East Austin homeowner wanted some steps so her family guests could access the back yard more easily.
captions.04.jpeg: I designed and build these wide steps with a low rise and a wide tread to elegantly unite the levels.
captions.05.png: The completed backyard oasis with the new steps. The homeowners were very happy with the results and their dog loves the new access to the yard.
